name: Chicken Chop Suey #2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (200g) parboiled and cut into bite-size pieces chicken
1 can (170g) sliced water chestnuts, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet.
2. Add chicken and stir-fry until thoroughly cooked but tender.
3. Add Teriyaki sauce and Soy sauce, stirring to combine.
4. Pour in 1 cup water and let the mixture simmer until it gurgles.
5. Stir in peanut butter and continue to simmer until the sauce is golden.
6. Add remaining water, mixed vegetables, water chestnuts, mushrooms, broccoli, cauliflower, and celery.
7. Heat through the ingredients.
8. Serve over hot boiled rice or Chinese chow mein noodles.
